relationships.context: N5 uses the wellness database for tracking life categories and logs
N5 uses the life counter script for metrics
N5 uses the life visualization script for data representation
N5 uses the accountability script to ensure task completion
N5 uses the patterns script to find trends
N5 uses the Fitbit bridge script to import health data
